query:
SELECT 
  bg.id,
  bg.bracketRound,
  bg.bracketRegion,
  bg.bracketPosition,
  bg.nextGameId,
  bg.awayTeamSlug,
  bg.homeTeamSlug
FROM bracketGames bg
WHERE bg.bracketRegion = 'EAST'
ORDER BY bg.bracketRound, bg.bracketPosition
LIMIT 20;
